response.justification: Despite strong recent experience with MCP and AI-agent infrastructure at staff level (Naver), the candidate falls far short of the core requirement: 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. Current AI work spans only ~13 months. Critical gaps include no Python (a required language), no documented vector database, RAG, or LLM optimization experience, and insufficient depth in AI-specific domains despite strong general software engineering foundations.
strengths: Currently at staff level working on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure frameworks at Naver, directly aligned with role's technology needs
19 years proven software engineering shipping production systems across multiple domains and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Strong TypeScript, full-stack development, and demonstrated leadership through workshops, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: Only ~13 months of AI/GenAI work (April 2025-present) vs. required minimum 8+ years in production AI solutions
Python not listed in technical skills despite being one of two required primary languages for the role
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or LLM optimization metrics

key_factors.factor: Only 13 months AI/GenAI experience vs 8+ year requirement
Current MCP and agentic workflows at staff level
Missing Python and AI-specific technical foundations
